app.name: PR Event 360
common.error: Something went wrong. Please try again.
acc.title: Accreditation request
acc.lede: Fill in this form to request your accreditation for {event}.
acc.commitPublish: I commit to crediting the event and sharing my publication.
acc.consent: I have read the privacy policy and agree that my data is processed to manage my accreditation.
acc.required: Required fields: first name, email and consent.
acc.closed.title: Registrations closed
acc.closed.body: Registrations for {event} are now closed. Thank you for your interest.
acc.deadline.label: Registration deadline
acc.success.title: Request sent
acc.success.body: Thank you {name}. You will receive a confirmation email. After review, a personal link will be sent to you for your interview and report requests.
space.lede: Submit your interview and report requests for {event}, and track their status.
space.new.title: New request
space.requests.title: Your requests
space.planning.title: My schedule
space.planning.empty: No confirmed slot yet. Your accepted interviews with a time slot will appear here.
space.planning.lede: Your confirmed interviews with their time slot.
space.newsroom.title: Press resources
space.newsroom.desc: Press releases, press kits, official photos and videos to download.
login.title: Sign in to your space
login.lede: Sign in to your space for {event} with your email and password.
login.noPassword: No password yet? Open your space via the link sent by email to create one.
space.password.title: Secure my access
space.password.hint: Create a password to sign back in to your space without relying on the email link.
space.password.setHint: Password set ✓ You can sign back in with your email and password.
space.password.tooShort: Password must be at least 8 characters.
acc.haveAccount: Already accredited? Sign in to your space
forgot.title: Forgot password
forgot.lede: Enter your email: if an account exists, you’ll receive a link to reset your password.
forgot.done: If an account exists for this email, a reset link has just been sent. Check your spam folder.
reset.title: New password
reset.lede: Choose a new password for your space.
space.photo.title: Photo rules & authorisation
space.photo.contract: ⚠ A contract must be signed on site.
acc.coverageRule: Rules: by submitting photos or videos to the press review after the event, you authorise the organiser to archive them and use them for promotional purposes (re-confirmed at the time of submission).
space.coverage.title: Your press coverage
space.coverage.ledeEnded: The event is over — share your publications (articles, social, videos) and photos for the press review.
space.coverage.ledeUpcoming: You will be able to submit your publications and photos here after the event.
space.coverage.errConsent: For a media file, tick both authorisations (archiving + promotion).
space.coverage.titlePlaceholder: e.g. Rolling Stone article, BBC report…
space.coverage.consentArchive: I authorise the organiser to keep this media in their archives.
space.coverage.consentPromo: I authorise its use for promoting the event.
space.password.changeHint: A password is already set. To change it, use “forgot password” — a secure link will be emailed to you.
